patches.hypothesis: The refined fix involves using a more robust approach to handle illegal types, adding more test cases to cover edge cases, removing hardcoded values, and making the logic more generic. The refined patch addressing these issues should maintain test-passing behavior and handle general cases, not just test inputs. It should also include proper edge case handling and avoid the overfitting patterns identified.
